Source:  https://github.com/B-Con/crypto-algorithms
Commit:  cfbde48414baacf51fc7c74f275190881f037d32
Date:    2015-04-26
License: public domain (see LICENSE.txt)

Vendored files:
  sha256.h
  sha256.c

Local modifications (stm32-bare-metal):
  sha256.c — replaced "#include <stdlib.h>" + "#include <memory.h>"
             with "#include <string.h>". <memory.h> is a glibc
             extension that does not ship with arm-none-eabi-gcc's
             newlib; <stdlib.h> was unused. <string.h> provides
             memset, the only libc symbol this file references.
